title: Command palette
searchPlaceholder: Search actions or products by name, SKU, or barcode…
noResultsHint: Try a different keyword, or close the palette with Esc and use the sidebar.

products.addFailed: The product could not be added

navigate.sales: Cashier cockpit for the active site.
navigate.inventory: Stock movements and adjustments per site.
navigate.dayClose: Review sales, cash, fiscal, payment, and risk evidence for one business day.
navigate.posTouch: Touch-first checkout surface for the active site.
navigate.kds: Kitchen display for prep tickets and station progress.
navigate.customerDisplay: Customer-facing screen for the active sale.
navigate.restaurantTables: Floor map and table catalog for table-service venues.
navigate.dataImport: Map, validate, and import launch catalog data.
navigate.fiscalDocuments: Fiscal documents emitted from this tenant.
navigate.fiscalReports: Reports and downloads for fiscal authorities.

command.newSale: Clear the active cart and land on /sales.
command.logout: End the current session on this workstation.
command.createProduct: Open the product form pre-loaded in the active sale.
command.createCustomer: Open the customer form pre-loaded in the active sale.
